name: @posthog/node-host
description: The node-host utilityProcess runtime: hosts the agent loop (AgentService + gateway/MCP proxies + agent process tracking) off the Electron main process, serving the agent tRPC routers over MessagePorts and consuming main-resident capabilities (power, MCP apps, auth tokens, sqlite lookups) over a reverse host-capabilities port. Entry is forked by apps/code via utilityProcess; no electron imports (the parent port is typed structurally).
